name: nf-core On Slurm
summary: Run nf-core Nextflow pipelines on Slurm with conservative HPC defaults.
description: This skill provides a reviewed pattern for launching nf-core pipelines on Slurm-backed HPC systems, including a site config, sample sheet placeholder, container cache guidance, work directory controls, and a dry-run-first launch wrapper.

inputs.name: pipeline_name
inputs.description: nf-core pipeline name such as nf-core/rnaseq.

inputs.name: pipeline_revision
inputs.description: Pinned nf-core pipeline release or Git revision.

inputs.name: samplesheet
inputs.description: Pipeline-specific sample sheet or input manifest.

inputs.name: outdir
inputs.description: Durable output directory for final pipeline results.

inputs.name: work_dir
inputs.description: Scratch or project work directory for Nextflow task directories.

outputs.name: nfcore_launch_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable command, profile, config, work/cache paths, and resume policy.

outputs.name: nextflow_reports
outputs.description: Nextflow report, trace, timeline, DAG, and log files when the pipeline is run.

outputs.name: pipeline_results
outputs.description: nf-core pipeline outputs written to the requested durable output directory.

examples.title: Plan or run an nf-core pipeline

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run in plan-only mode, then run a small nf-core test profile on a Slurm debug partition with site-approved container settings.
